summary: Addressed systems_architect REQUEST_CHANGES for ambiguous BootSimulationInputV1 payloads. parseBootSimulationInputV1 now rejects mixed fixture-mode and runtime-content-pack-mode fields before selecting a boot path, so the concrete payload with fixture minimal-m1 plus source runtime-content-pack, seed, and invalid runtimeContentPack no longer boots a fixture or returns a runtime/hash. Added regression coverage in the M2 boot-boundary contract test.

tests_run.result: Current status includes protocol/sim-core/test changes, lead-authorized orchestration state changes, prior review/route messages, and the new REVIEW-2 handoff.

7 test files passed; 35 tests passed. Regression confirms mixed fixture plus runtime-content-pack payload rejects with invalid-payload at path $. Existing MODULE_TYPELESS_PACKAGE_JSON warning appeared for deterministic-rng-worker.ts.
Architecture boundaries passed. Self-test fixture produced 15 expected violation(s).
Node and worker-compatible hashes matched: hello 61e0ba1c, command/query d275faa4, save/load 28074edd; save/load byte length 10920.

tests_run.command: node -e JSON parse/shape check for M2-BOOT-BOUNDARY-001
tests_run.result: M2-BOOT-BOUNDARY-001 JSON shape ok: IN_PROGRESS, R3, 6 acceptance criteria.
1 protocol schema test file passed; 3 tests passed.
All matched files use Prettier code style after formatting the updated regression test.

decisions: Boot DTO mode fields are now mutually exclusive: any payload with fixture plus source, seed, or runtimeContentPack is rejected before boot selection.
The regression is asserted at bootSimulationV1 level so rejection is proven to return no SimulationRuntime, no WorldState, and no state hash.
No UI, client, desktop, content-source/historical, docs gate, economy, population, route-choice, or product-scope changes were made.
risks: R3 public boot contract still requires systems_architect acceptance.
The REVIEW-2 handoff includes files_changed per lead route instruction; the older project/schemas/handoff.schema.json does not currently define that field.
requested_action: Re-review the BootSimulationInputV1 mutually exclusive mode validation and regression test for ARCH-BOOT-001 closure.
